name: task_mark_needs_review
description:
Park a completed task pending human review. Call this instead of
task_set_status(done) when the task's extensions.review.required flag is true.
The task moves from in-progress to needs-review and waits for a human to
approve or reject via task_submit_review.

reason.description: One-sentence summary of what was done and why it warrants review (shown to the reviewer).
